title: taraxacum brachyceras
intro: Taraxacum brachyceras, also known as the lesser dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in traditional medicine to treat digestive issues and skin problems. The plant has been used to treat various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving liver function, and boosting the immune system. Taraxacum brachyceras can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, such as bloating and indigestion.
